Dewberries surround the lake, up and down the hill, every year during picking season. There is a pavilion with a grill to rest and eat if you make a longer day of it. Restrooms at the foot of the hill/ entrance to the area near a skatepark. Access: Public. Fal

Large fig tree next to DQ drive thru. We asked if we could pick some figs at the drive thru and they said yes. This was a couple of years ago. The fig tree is still there and very healthy. Access: Permitted by owner.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
